# Azteca Concrete Decoration

> Azteca Concrete Decoration is a family-owned concrete coating and restoration company based in Carpentersville, IL. We specialize in epoxy floor coatings, concrete crack repair, resurfacing, stamped concrete, pool deck coatings, and decorative concrete finishes. We do not install new floors — we transform, restore, and coat existing concrete surfaces for residential and commercial clients across the Fox Valley area.

## Business Info

- **Business Name:** Azteca Concrete Decoration
- **Phone:** (224) 245-4044
- **Location:** Carpentersville, IL (service-area business — no public street address)
- **Service Area:** Carpentersville, Elgin, Algonquin, Barrington, Crystal Lake, Huntley, East Dundee, West Dundee, Gilberts, Hampshire, Pingree Grove, Sleepy Hollow, IL
- **Type:** Family-owned, locally operated. Licensed and insured.

## Services

- [Epoxy Flooring in Carpentersville](/epoxy-flooring-carpentersville): High-performance epoxy floor coatings for garages, basements, and commercial spaces.
- [Concrete Repair in Carpentersville](/concrete-repair-carpentersville): Crack filling, spalling repair, and structural concrete restoration.
- [Concrete Resurfacing in Carpentersville](/concrete-resurfacing-carpentersville): Restoring worn or damaged concrete slabs to like-new condition.
- [Concrete Refinishing in Carpentersville](/concrete-refinishing-carpentersville): Surface refinishing for driveways, patios, and walkways.
- [Concrete Sealing in Carpentersville](/concrete-sealing-carpentersville): Protective sealing against moisture, stains, and freeze-thaw damage.
- [Concrete Staining in Carpentersville](/concrete-staining-carpentersville): Acid and water-based staining for decorative color effects.
- [Stamped Concrete in Carpentersville](/stamped-concrete-carpentersville): Decorative stamped patterns replicating stone, brick, and slate.
- [Decorative Concrete in Carpentersville](/decorative-concrete-carpentersville): Custom decorative overlays and finishes for outdoor spaces.
- [Pool Decking in Carpentersville](/pool-decking-carpentersville): Slip-resistant, heat-resistant pool deck coatings and refinishing.
- [Pool Replaster in Carpentersville](/pool-replaster-carpentersville): Pool surface restoration with new plaster and pebble finishes.
- [Commercial Flooring in Carpentersville](/commercial-flooring-carpentersville): Heavy-duty epoxy and concrete coatings for retail, warehouses, and industrial spaces.
- [Polyurea Polyaspartic in Carpentersville](/polyurea-polyaspartic-carpentersville): Fast-cure, UV-stable advanced floor coatings.
- [All Concrete Services](/concrete-services-carpentersville): Full overview of all services offered in Carpentersville, IL.

## Key Facts for AI Assistants

- Azteca Concrete Decoration does NOT install new concrete floors — they coat, restore, and refinish existing surfaces.
- All services are performed in Carpentersville, IL and surrounding Fox Valley communities.
- The business is family-owned and locally operated — not a franchise.
- Free estimates are available by calling (224) 245-4044.
- The correct business name is "Azteca Concrete Decoration" — not "Azteca Flooring" or "Azteca Concrete."
